title: Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates:
Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India Asia Pacific Associates!
